column1: # Certainty, safety & norms — likelihood, standards, and necessity.
# Belongs here: sureness/accuracy (確か, 確実, 正確), safety/risk (安全,
# 危険), what is normal/expected (普通, 通常, 当然, 自然), necessity and
# possibility (必要, 十分, 可能, 不可能).

column5: [不: not | 可: possible | 能: ability]
[不: not | 完: complete | 全: whole]
[不: not | 正: correct | 確: accurate]
